title: Brooklyn
description: A young Irishwoman emigrates to Brooklyn and is torn between two lives.

title: Nora Webster
description: A widow rebuilds her life in 1960s Wexford.

title: Dubliners
description: Fifteen stories of middle-class life in early 20th-century Dublin.

title: A Portrait of the Artist as a Young Man
description: The artistic awakening of Stephen Dedalus.

title: The Perfect Storm
description: The true story of a swordboat lost in the 1991 nor'easter.

title: Master and Commander
description: The first of the Aubrey-Maturin naval adventures.

title: The Old Man and the Sea
description: An aging fisherman battles a great marlin far out in the Gulf Stream.

title: Moby-Dick
description: A whaling captain's monomaniacal hunt for the white whale.

title: The Sea
description: A widower returns to the seaside town of his childhood.

title: Amongst Women
description: An ageing republican veteran dominates his rural family.

title: Typhoon
description: A steamer captain drives his ship through a Pacific typhoon.

title: The Story of Lucy Gault
description: A childhood misunderstanding shapes a life of solitude on the Irish coast.

title: Death of a Naturalist
description: Heaney's debut collection rooted in the Derry countryside.

title: The Third Policeman
description: A darkly comic novel of murder, bicycles and eternity.

title: The Sea-Wolf
description: Castaways aboard a brutal sealing schooner.

title: The North Water
description: Violence aboard a doomed 19th-century Arctic whaler.
